confirmedFindingsFixed.title: ESLint react-hooks/set-state-in-effect in compare panel
confirmedFindingsFixed.resolution: Derived loading from pinned-key snapshot instead of synchronous setState in useEffect.

residualRisks: Compare mode triggers up to three parallel forecast fetches; slow networks may show loading longer than single-city view.
Pinned cities are session-only; refresh clears pins.
